description: Zero trust security. Never trust, always verify. Assume breach.
core_principles: Trust follows verification, never the reverse
Security pervasive throughout, not just at perimeter
Assume breach: design for when, not just if

non_human_identities.description: Each agent has exactly one identity. Never share credentials.

smaug.api_keys_note: HyperLiquid keys MUST be vault-managed JIT when live

rules: No agent may use another agents bot token
No credentials embedded in code or config
All credential refs point to .env files only
Smaug API keys vault-managed when live trading activates

assume_breach_blast_radius.quandalf: Can only write theses/specs/lessons. Cannot trade or modify firewall. Bad suggestions caught by backtest validation.
assume_breach_blast_radius.frodex: Can only write backtest results/research cards. Cannot design strategies or trade. Corrupted data caught by schema validation.
assume_breach_blast_radius.oragorn: Can only write event log, trigger pipelines. Cannot write strategies or trade. Improper delegations caught by Balrog.
assume_breach_blast_radius.logron: Can only write reports/known_fixes. Cannot modify strategies or trade. False reports caught by cross-referencing SQLite.
assume_breach_blast_radius.smaug: Can only execute pre-approved trades. Requires Balrog pass AND human approval. Limited by circuit breakers.

approved_tools_reference.note: Reference doc only. Balrog agent_boundaries handles runtime enforcement. Add runtime checks when Smaug goes live.

sub_agent_spawning.note: Sub-agent spawning is PIPELINE-DRIVEN, not agent-choice. Agents will not reliably spawn sub-agents on their own. Lobster pipeline steps dictate when a specialist sub-agent is spawned.
sub_agent_spawning.pattern: Pipeline step defines: spawn sub-agent with this input, expect this schema output. Prime does not choose whether to delegate. Pipeline decides.
sub_agent_spawning.temporary_specialists: Sub-agents are temporary. They get a narrow task, focused context, do the work, return result, terminate. Not permanent agents.
